personalInfo.title: Director of Product Engineering
personalInfo.tagline: Engineering executive with 15+ years architecting fintech platforms at scale — from credit risk infrastructure and lending systems to AI-driven data products. I build the teams, the culture, and the technology that powers financial outcomes.

about.title:
Engineering at Scale,
Purpose-Driven
narrative: I don't just ship software — I build the systems, teams, and culture that allow organisations to compete at scale in fintech. Over 15 years, I've moved from hands-on engineering to executive leadership, accumulating deep expertise across product architecture, distributed systems, and financial services technology.

At ADF Data Science, I lead a distributed organisation of 70+ engineers across product, platform, and data engineering. My focus is on translating business ambition into executable technical strategy — reducing time-to-market, improving reliability, and building teams that can operate at enterprise scale without losing product agility.

My background spans the full lending lifecycle: origination, credit scoring, risk analytics, collections, and regulatory reporting. I understand fintech not just as a domain but as a set of constraints that demand both engineering rigour and product empathy.

highlights.title: Team Architecture
highlights.description: Built and scaled engineering organisations from seed to 70+ — across India and remote globally. Structured hiring, levelling, and career frameworks from scratch.

highlights.title: Platform Architecture
highlights.description: Designed multi-tenant lending platforms, credit decisioning engines, and real-time analytics pipelines handling millions of transactions in regulated environments.

highlights.title: DevOps Transformation
highlights.description: Led cloud-native migration and CI/CD adoption reducing deployment cycles by 70% and achieving 99.9% SLA across production fintech workloads.

highlights.title: Fintech Domain Depth
highlights.description: 15+ years in lending, credit risk, and financial data systems — from scorecard design to regulatory compliance architecture in high-volume consumer finance.

experience.summary: Executive engineering leadership for a fintech-focused data science organisation. Accountable for product engineering strategy, platform architecture, and org-wide engineering culture across lending, analytics, and AI product lines.

achievements.title: Organisation Scale:
achievements.description: Built and led a 70+ engineer organisation across product engineering, platform, data, and ML teams — establishing hiring pipelines, career ladders, and a distributed team operating model.

achievements.title: Fintech Platform Architecture:
achievements.description: Architected a multi-tenant lending platform supporting end-to-end loan origination, risk decisioning, collections, and regulatory reporting. Platform processes 500K+ loan applications annually.

achievements.title: DevOps Transformation:
achievements.description: Led cloud-native migration to AWS with Kubernetes orchestration, GitOps workflows, and automated CI/CD — reducing release cycles from bi-weekly to daily with 99.9% production uptime.

achievements.title: AI-Driven Products:
achievements.description: Shipped 10+ data products including credit scorecards, predictive delinquency models, fraud detection pipelines, and an LLM-powered collections assistance platform.

experience.summary: Senior Operations Engineer responsible for infrastructure automation, CI/CD pipelines, and systems reliability for lending management platforms. Drove automation initiatives that streamlined operations and enhanced system performance.

achievements.title: Automation Excellence:
achievements.description: Automated LMS batch systems and financial reporting pipelines, reducing manual processing time by 80% and improving data accuracy.

achievements.title: CI/CD Implementation:
achievements.description: Built comprehensive Jenkins pipelines for automated testing, deployment, and payouts — enabling daily releases with zero-downtime deployments.

achievements.title: Database Optimisation:
achievements.description: Enhanced MySQL performance through query optimisation, indexing strategies, and replication setup — supporting 10x transaction volume growth.

achievements.title: Infrastructure as Code:
achievements.description: Implemented configuration management and monitoring solutions, improving system reliability to 99.95% uptime.

experience.summary: Software Engineer focused on Python development, REST API design, and automation solutions. Built invoice processing systems and analytics platforms that drove digital transformation for enterprise clients.

achievements.title: API Development:
achievements.description: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for invoice automation, processing 50K+ invoices monthly with 99.8% accuracy.

achievements.title: Analytics Platform:
achievements.description: Built Python-based analytics engine providing real-time insights on invoice data, reducing reporting time from hours to minutes.

achievements.title: OCR Integration:
achievements.description: Implemented OCR conversion systems for digitising paper invoices, achieving 95% accuracy in automated data extraction.

achievements.title: Digital Transformation:
achievements.description: Contributed to end-to-end digital transformation projects, helping clients reduce manual processing costs by 60%.
